mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, title, user_message_count, ai_message_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation (conversation_id, title, user_message_count, ai_message_count, status) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{title}, #{userMessageCount}, #{aiMessageCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET user_message_count = user_message_count + #{userDelta}, ai_message_count = ai_message_count + #{aiDelta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, title, user_message_count, ai_message_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
